description: LLMCosts.dev — Open LLM Pricing Registry. Single source of truth for LLM pricing, benchmarks, and performance data. Updated daily by automated pipeline.

notes.pricing: Prices in USD per 1M tokens. Fetched daily from OpenRouter API.
notes.benchmarks: arena_elo from LMSYS Chatbot Arena. mmlu/arc/hellaswag/humaneval from HuggingFace Open LLM Leaderboard.
notes.performance: speed_tokens_per_sec and median_latency_ms populated daily by self-measurement via OpenRouter. Null until first measurement run.
notes.cost_examples: Calculated assuming 500 input + 500 output tokens per average API call.
notes.data_confidence: high=verified from source, medium=estimated, low=synthesised. See field_confidence per field (0-100).
notes.null_first_policy: Any field with no verified source is null. Never fabricated. data_confidence: estimated flags synthesised fields.

models.name: Google: Nano Banana 2 (Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview)
Google: Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview Custom Tools
Nex AGI: DeepSeek V3.1 Nex N1
Google: Nano Banana Pro (Gemini 3 Pro Image Preview)
Cohere: Command R+ (08-2024)
not_good_for: Edge cases with limited training data
